privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring a synthetically-created LimeSurvey survey (ID 884921) with specific operational settings. The survey title is 'TechSummit 2024 Post-Conference Evaluation'. Agents must set an end message containing three specific phrases: 'TechSummit 2024', 'GlobalTech Solutions', and 'redirected'. The end URL must be set to https://www.globaltechsolutions.com/techsummit2024-thankyou with description 'GlobalTech Solutions Sponsor Offer'. Admin notifications must be configured to send to events@techsummit2024.org. Additional requirements include enabling auto-redirect, save-and-resume, date stamping, and survey activation. The verifier checks these 8 configuration elements with a total possible score of 100 points, requiring at least 70 points to pass.
